title: Rap Trap: Hip Hop on Trial
overview: The criminal case against Young Thug and Gunna, two of the biggest names in hip hop, reignited a conversation around the use of lyrics in the courtroom and sparked a movement to protect art. Are these words evidence of a crime or fiction set to rhyme?

trailers.title: “Rap Trap: Hip-Hop on Trial” premieres Feb. 23, on Hulu
